market_moves.summary: Headline 3.0% (vs 3.1% est), Core 3.3% (vs 3.4% est). Bull-steepener: 10Y -4bps, 2Y -9bps. Long-duration tech led.
Lagarde hawkish on path forward — EUR/USD reversed gain to close -0.2%.
WTI closed $72.55, +0.1%. Headline-driven; tomorrow's JMMC sets tone.

asia_releases.name: China Industrial Production YoY (April)
asia_releases.impact: Below 6% = bearish copper/iron ore; above 7% = bullish global cyclicals

geopolitical_summary: Trump-Xi summit announced for June 15 — markets pricing reduced tariff escalation. Watch USD/CNH for pre-summit positioning.
